command_log.command: echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)" && echo "Last 5 commits:" && git log --format='%h %s' -5 && echo '---' && echo "Open issues: $(gh issue list --state open --json number --limit 100 2>/dev/null | jq length)" && echo "Backlog: $(ls .kiln/issues/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') items" && echo "PRDs: $(ls docs/features/*/PRD.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" && echo '---' && echo 'Task progress:' && for f in specs/*/tasks.md; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; DONE=$(grep -c '\[X\]' "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); TOTAL=$(grep -c '\[[ X]\]' "$f" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "  $(dirname $f | xargs basename): $DONE/$TOTAL"; done && echo "VERSION: $(cat VERSION 2>/dev/null || echo none)"

steps.output:
## Backlog Issues
2026-04-02-lobster-workflow-engine-plugin.md: Create lobster — hook-based workflow engine plugin for Claude Code [prd-created]
2026-04-02-ux-evaluator-nested-screenshot-dir.md: UX evaluator creates nested .kiln/qa/.kiln/qa/screenshots/ due to relative path [prd-created]
2026-04-03-shelf-note-templates.md: Shelf plugin needs explicit templates for each Obsidian note type [prd-created]
2026-04-03-shelf-notes-backlinks-tags.md: Shelf notes need backlinks to project dashboard and consistent tags [prd-created]
2026-04-03-shelf-sync-close-archived-issues.md: shelf-sync should close Obsidian notes for archived backlog issues [prd-created]
2026-04-03-shelf-sync-docs.md: Add docs sync to shelf-sync — push PRD summaries to Obsidian [prd-created]
2026-04-03-shelf-sync-update-tech-tags.md: shelf-sync should update project tech stack tags during sync [prd-created]
2026-04-04-add-todo-skill.md: Add /todo skill to kiln [prd-created]
2026-04-04-wheel-branch-subroutine-support.md: Wheel engine needs step-level `next` field for branch subroutines [prd-created]
2026-04-04-wheel-cleanup-in-hook.md: Wheel: Move workflow cleanup into hook — detect terminal step IDs [prd-created]
2026-04-04-wheel-list-skill.md: Add wheel-list skill to view all available workflows [prd-created]
2026-04-04-wheel-skill-activation.md: Wheel workflows should activate via skill, not auto-fire on every session [prd-created]
2026-04-07-clay-idea-pmf-classification.md: Clay idea skill should classify ideas by market intent [open]
2026-04-07-clay-nested-product-folders.md: Support nested product folders in clay (sub-ideas under parent products) [open]
2026-04-07-qa-engineer-test-dedup-efficiency.md: QA engineer should audit tests for overlap and efficiency [prd-created]
2026-04-08-init-no-src-tests-dirs.md: Init script should not create src/ and tests/ directories [open]
2026-04-08-shelf-create-holistic-progress.md: shelf-create should assess project progress holistically [open]
2026-04-08-shelf-create-root-path-lookup.md: shelf-create should start at vault root when finding project directory [open]
2026-04-08-shelf-create-template-compliance.md: shelf-create not following Obsidian template; add repair function [open]
2026-04-08-test3.md: test3 — workflow e2e test [open]
2026-04-08-unify-project-status-labels.md: Unify project status labels across shelf skills [open]
2026-04-08-workflow-in-plugin-package.md: report-issue-and-sync workflow must ship with the kiln plugin [open]
## Completed
27
 completed issues

command_log.command: echo '## Backlog Issues' && for f in .kiln/issues/*.md; do [ -f "$f" ] || { echo '(none)'; break; }; TITLE=$(grep -m1 '^title:' "$f" | sed 's/^title:[[:space:]]*"\{0,1\}//;s/"$//' 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); STATUS=$(grep -m1 '^status:' "$f" | sed 's/^status:[[:space:]]*//' 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); echo "$(basename $f): $TITLE [$STATUS]"; done && echo '## Completed' && ls .kiln/issues/completed/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ' && echo ' completed issues'

command_log.command: for prd in docs/features/*/PRD.md; do [ -f "$prd" ] || { echo '(no PRDs)'; break; }; DIR=$(basename $(dirname "$prd")); SLUG=$(echo "$DIR" | sed 's/^[0-9]\{4\}-[0-9]\{2\}-[0-9]\{2\}-//'); TITLE=$(grep -m1 '^# ' "$prd" | sed 's/^# //'); FR_COUNT=$(grep -c 'FR-' "$prd" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); NFR_COUNT=$(grep -c 'NFR-' "$prd" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); STATUS=$(grep -m1 '^\*\*Status\*\*' "$prd" | sed 's/.*: *//'); echo "SLUG=$SLUG TITLE=$TITLE FRs=$FR_COUNT NFRs=$NFR_COUNT STATUS=$STATUS PATH=$prd"; done

echo '## Tech Stack Detection' && ls package.json tsconfig.json Cargo.toml pyproject.toml requirements.txt go.mod Gemfile Dockerfile docker-compose.yml docker-compose.yaml compose.yml compose.yaml 2>/dev/null || echo '(no markers)' && if [ -f package.json ]; then echo '---' && echo 'package.json deps:' && cat package.json | jq -r '(.dependencies // {}) + (.devDependencies // {}) | keys[]' 2>/dev/null; fi && if [ -d .github/workflows ]; then echo '---' && echo 'infra/github-actions'; fi
